global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear focus on savings for travel.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo reading 'HorizonHop' prominently displayed at the top center.

elements.label: Last-minute savings headline
elements.description: A large, eye-catching headline that reads 'Last-minute savings' in a clear, modern font.

elements.label: Body text description
elements.description: Text below the headline that states 'Hotels + flights in one tap' in a smaller font.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag displaying '€9.99' in a bold font, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom that says 'Book now' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Circular decorative shape
elements.description: A large circular shape in a lighter orange shade, adding visual interest to the background.

elements.label: Square decorative shape
elements.description: A square shape in a lighter orange shade, complementing the circular shape.

elements.label: HorizonHop text
elements.description: The text 'HorizonHop' in a bold font, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Savings description
elements.description: Text that reads 'Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap' in a clear, modern font.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A button at the bottom that reads 'Book now' in a bold, inviting font.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A small text displaying '€9.99' in a bold font, indicating the cost.
